user.title: Connection Type
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Sky Lite Evolve projector.

cloud.title: Tuya Cloud Credentials
cloud.description: Enter your Tuya IoT Cloud project credentials.

local.title: Local Connection
local.description:
Enter your Tuya cloud credentials and device IP. The local key will be fetched automatically. Cloud credentials are not stored.

To find the device IP, check your router's connected devices — the Evolve may appear as 'lwip0'. The Tuya Smart app shows the MAC address under Device > Edit > Device Information.

Tip: Set a static IP / DHCP reservation for the device in your router so the IP doesn't change.

data.ip_address: Device LAN IP (e.g. 192.168.1.x — check your router)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the projector. Please check your credentials.
